scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.verify: bun run build && bun src/cli/main.ts validate --config tests/fixtures/minimal/studio.config.ts && bun src/cli/main.ts codegen --check --config tests/fixtures/minimal/studio.config.ts && bun src/cli/main.ts verify --config tests/fixtures/minimal/studio.config.ts && bun src/cli/main.ts migrate --config tests/fixtures/minimal/studio.config.ts
